description: Letter addressed to Abu al-Faraj, son of Daniel the teacher, in the “habs Bunan” neighborhood. The writer describes that the wife of his son is asking for a divorce, framed as the result of her husband’s mistreatment; also mentions Abu ‘Ali. (Oded Zinger, Women, Gender, and Law, 140) EMS
description_he: מכתב לאבו אל-פרג' בן דניאל המלמד: אשת בנו מבקשת גט בשל התנהגות הבעל. מוזכר גם אבו עלי.
